description: Perform a compliance audit on vendor communications by identifying all emails related to the domain 'sourceforge.net'. Create a folder named 'Audit-SourceForge' and move all identified emails into it. Within that folder, flag any emails containing the keywords 'error', 'fail', 'failure', or 'warning'. Draft an email to legal@company.com with the subject 'SourceForge Audit Complete' stating the total number of emails moved to the audit folder.
